name: resume-ready-api-gateway
description: Beginner-friendly custom API Gateway project built incrementally over 5 days.

scripts.dev:user:1: set PORT=4001&& set INSTANCE_NAME=user-service-1&& tsx watch services/user-service/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:user:2: set PORT=4002&& set INSTANCE_NAME=user-service-2&& tsx watch services/user-service/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:order:1: set PORT=5001&& set INSTANCE_NAME=order-service-1&& tsx watch services/order-service/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:order:2: set PORT=5002&& set INSTANCE_NAME=order-service-2&& tsx watch services/order-service/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:product:1: set PORT=6001&& set INSTANCE_NAME=product-service-1&& tsx watch services/product-service/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:product:2: set PORT=6002&& set INSTANCE_NAME=product-service-2&& tsx watch services/product-service/src/index.ts
